languages.text: "Гедонизм — понятный позыв. Желание испытать жизнь в полной мере. Но в корне этого стремления лежит еще одно, более примитивное".
"Hedonism is an understandable urge. A desire to experience life to the fullest. But at the root of this lies another, more primitive drive."
languages.original_text: "Гедонизм — понятный позыв. Желание испытать жизнь в полной мере. Но в корне этого стремления лежит еще одно, более примитивное".

traits.locale_text: "Hedonism is an understandable urge. A desire to experience life to the fullest. But at the root of this lies another, more primitive drive."
"Hedonism is an understandable urge. A desire to experience life to the fullest. But at the root of this lies another, more primitive drive."
"Hedonism is an understandable urge. A desire to experience life to the fullest. But at the root of this lies another, more primitive drive."

languages.text: 「快楽主義は理解できる衝動だ。人生を最大限に味わいたいという欲求。しかしその根底には、もっと原始的な欲求がある」
languages.original_text: "Hedonism is an understandable urge. A desire to experience life to the fullest. But at the root of this lies another, more primitive drive."

traits.locale_text: 快楽主義は理解できる衝動だ。人生を最大限に味わいたいという欲求。しかしその根底には、もっと原始的な欲求がある。

languages.text: “享乐主义是一种可以理解的冲动。一种渴望充分享受生命的欲求。但在其根源处，潜藏着另一种更原始的驱动力。”
languages.original_text: "Hedonism is an understandable urge. A desire to experience life to the fullest. But at the root of this lies another, more primitive drive."

traits.locale_text: “享乐主义是一种可以理解的冲动。一种渴望充分享受生命的欲求。但在其根源处，潜藏着另一种更原始的驱动力。”

languages.text: «El hedonismo es un impulso comprensible. Es el deseo de experimentar la vida al máximo... pero en él se oculta otra necesidad, más primitiva».
languages.original_text: "Hedonism is an understandable urge. A desire to experience life to the fullest. But at the root of this lies another, more primitive drive."

traits.locale_text: «El hedonismo es un impulso comprensible. Es el deseo de experimentar la vida al máximo... pero en él se oculta otra necesidad, más primitiva».

languages.text: "Hedonismus ist ein verständlicher Drang. Der Wunsch, das Leben in vollen Zügen zu genießen. Aber dem liegt ein anderer, primitiverer Wunsch zugrunde."
languages.original_text: "Hedonism is an understandable urge. A desire to experience life to the fullest. But at the root of this lies another, more primitive drive."

traits.locale_text: "Hedonismus ist ein verständlicher Drang. Der Wunsch, das Leben in vollen Zügen zu genießen. Aber dem liegt ein anderer, primitiverer Wunsch zugrunde."

languages.text: « L'hédonisme est un désir compréhensible, mais cette envie de profiter de la vie au maximum découle d'un autre besoin plus primitif encore. »
languages.original_text: "Hedonism is an understandable urge. A desire to experience life to the fullest. But at the root of this lies another, more primitive drive."

traits.locale_text: « L'hédonisme est un désir compréhensible, mais cette envie de profiter de la vie au maximum découle d'un autre besoin plus primitif encore. »

languages.text: "Hedonizm, anlaşılabilir bir dürtüdür. Hayatı dolu dolu yaşama arzusu. Ancak bunun kökeninde daha ilkel başka bir dürtü yatar."
languages.original_text: "Hedonism is an understandable urge. A desire to experience life to the fullest. But at the root of this lies another, more primitive drive."

traits.locale_text: "Hedonizm, anlaşılabilir bir dürtüdür. Hayatı dolu dolu yaşama arzusu. Ancak bunun kökeninde daha ilkel başka bir dürtü yatar."
